verdict: A wonderfully fluid and beautifully synced Easy chart that captures the energetic tempo of the remix perfectly with highly comfortable foot-flow.

issues.problem: Staggered overlapping holds (D starting at 19.752 and U starting at 19.935) might be slightly too complex for an Easy chart's coordination level, though they are rhythmically accurate.
Multiple very short 1-beat holds (0.366s) throughout the chart act almost like normal taps, though they do help highlight the quick vocal stabs.
